title: CHS
description: This modpack includes Water Frames and its dependencies, allowing synchronized in-game watch parties and movie nights. It also features the Blue Beetle mod by Yo Fadda for harmless admin-only pranks and fun event interactions.
body:
This modpack includes the Water Frames mod (along with all required dependencies), enabling users to host synchronized group watch-parties and movie nights directly within Minecraft. With this setup, players can gather in-game, stream media together, and enjoy a shared cinematic experience in a fully immersive environment.

Additional Admin Feature

For server administrators, this pack also includes the Blue Beetle Mod by Yo Fadda. This mod has been added solely for light-hearted fun and creative administrator abilities. It allows admins to execute harmless pranks, enhance roleplay moments, and provide entertaining interactions without disrupting gameplay balance.

Usage Note

If you plan to use this modpack for school events, club gatherings, or community activities, have fun and enjoy a unique, social, and interactive Minecraft experience!
